Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO REAL PROPERTY TAXATION
AMEND BY RESTORING TO ORIGINAL PRINT 11267
REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.616

Title: Authorizes the town of Hempstead to file an application for exemption from real property taxes for a certain parcel of land located in the hamlet of West Hempstead
Summary: Authorizes the town of Hempstead to file an application for exemption from real property taxes for a certain parcel of land located in the hamlet of West Hempstead.
ActClause: AN ACT authorizing the assessor of the county of Nassau to accept from the town of Hempstead an application for exemption from real property taxes
